data.name: CheckingAccessLead
data.value: Verifying your session before loading client management.

data.name: HeroLead
data.value: Register internal clients by auth flow, maintain redirect URIs, and manage machine-to-machine callers that need a client secret.

data.name: TotalClientsLead
data.value: Login-based apps and service-to-service callers managed by the IDP.

data.name: InteractiveLead
data.value: For Web, SPA, or desktop apps using authorization_code + refresh_token + PKCE.

data.name: MachineLead
data.value: For backend services or jobs using client_credentials.

data.name: ClientSecretGeneratedLead
data.value: Copy it now. OpenIddict will not show the plain-text secret again after this response.

data.name: RegisteredClientsLead
data.value: Review auth flow, scopes, and redirect URIs before shipping integrations.

data.name: SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by client id or display name

data.name: SearchResultSummaryEmpty
data.value: No clients match the current filters.

data.name: NoMatchingClientsLead
data.value: Try another keyword or register a new application.

data.name: EditClientLead
data.value: Only the supported OpenIddict auth flows are exposed here.

data.name: RegisterClientLead
data.value: Pick the auth flow first and the form applies the matching OpenIddict settings.

data.name: ProfileHelp
data.value: Choose whether this is a user sign-in app or a service-to-service client.

data.name: AuthFlowHelp
data.value: Choose which OpenIddict auth flow this client uses.

data.name: ScopesPlaceholder
data.value: One scope per line or comma separated

data.name: ScopesHelp
data.value: The default API scope is prefilled for new clients.

data.name: InteractiveProfileBehavior
data.value: Use this for internal Web, SPA, or desktop apps where a user signs in. The system applies public client + authorization_code + refresh_token + PKCE, and requires redirect URIs.

data.name: AuthorizationCodeFlowBehavior
data.value: Use this when the client signs users in. The system applies a public client with authorization_code + refresh_token + PKCE and requires redirect URIs.

data.name: MachineProfileBehavior
data.value: Use this for backend services, jobs, or daemons with no user interaction. The system applies confidential client + client_credentials, requires a client secret, and does not use redirect URIs.

data.name: ClientCredentialsFlowBehavior
data.value: Use this for backend services, jobs, or daemons. The system applies a confidential client with client_credentials, requires a client secret, and does not use redirect URIs.

data.name: PublicClientsMustNotSpecifyClientSecret
data.value: Public clients must not specify a client secret.

data.name: AtLeastOneGrantTypeRequired
data.value: At least one grant type must be provided.

data.name: AuthorizationCodeRedirectRequired
data.value: Authorization code clients must provide at least one redirect URI.

data.name: InteractiveClientsMustBePublic
data.value: Web / SPA (user sign-in) clients must be public clients.

data.name: InteractiveClientsGrantTypesInvalid
data.value: Web / SPA (user sign-in) clients only support authorization_code and refresh_token.

data.name: InteractiveClientsMustRequirePkce
data.value: Web / SPA (user sign-in) clients must require PKCE.

data.name: MachineClientsMustBeConfidential
data.value: Service / Daemon (machine-to-machine) clients must be confidential clients.

data.name: MachineClientsGrantTypesInvalid
data.value: Service / Daemon (machine-to-machine) clients only support client_credentials.

data.name: MachineClientsMustNotConfigureRedirectUris
data.value: Service / Daemon (machine-to-machine) clients must not configure redirect URIs.

data.name: MachineClientsMustNotConfigurePostLogoutRedirectUris
data.value: Service / Daemon (machine-to-machine) clients must not configure post-logout redirect URIs.

data.name: UnsupportedOnboardingProfile
data.value: Only two internal client types are supported: Web / SPA (public + auth code/refresh token + PKCE) and Service / Daemon (confidential + client_credentials).

data.name: AuthorizationCodeClientsMustBePublic
data.value: Authorization Code Flow clients must be public clients in the current onboarding.

data.name: AuthorizationCodeClientsGrantTypesInvalid
data.value: Authorization Code Flow clients only support authorization_code and refresh_token.

data.name: AuthorizationCodeClientsMustRequirePkce
data.value: Authorization Code Flow clients must require PKCE.

data.name: ClientCredentialsClientsMustBeConfidential
data.value: Client Credentials Flow clients must be confidential clients.

data.name: ClientCredentialsClientsGrantTypesInvalid
data.value: Client Credentials Flow clients only support client_credentials.

data.name: ClientCredentialsClientsMustNotConfigureRedirectUris
data.value: Client Credentials Flow clients must not configure redirect URIs.

data.name: ClientCredentialsClientsMustNotConfigurePostLogoutRedirectUris
data.value: Client Credentials Flow clients must not configure post-logout redirect URIs.

data.name: UnsupportedAuthFlow
data.value: Only two internal auth flows are supported: Authorization Code Flow (public + auth code/refresh token + PKCE) and Client Credentials Flow (confidential + client_credentials).

data.name: ClientNotFound
data.value: The client could not be found.

data.name: AtLeastOneScopeRequired
data.value: At least one scope is required.

data.name: InteractiveClientRedirectRequired
data.value: Interactive clients require at least one redirect URI.
